asset_name: Victory, defeat, boss reward, and run summary UI chrome
notes: Wave 1 generated candidate copied from Codex generated_images into governed asset workspace; runtime integration blocked.
final_prompt: Create a two-panel concept sheet for Orbwalker result screens: victory/run-complete and defeat/run-ended backgrounds with matching ornate UI framing. No readable text. Mobile portrait friendly, central safe areas for stats and buttons, dark fantasy stone/metal/gold style.
